chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2926 of 2025 Siraj Khan Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 1 to 5. 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 04.09.2025 Petitioner Siraj Khan in person. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, Assistant Advocate General along with SIP Muhammad Ishaq, Additional SHO F.B. Industrial Area, Karachi. Respondent No.4 Rahim Khan in person. -.-.- Mr. Masroor Ahmed Advocate files his memo of appearance on behalf of respondent No.2, which is taken on record. Comments have been filed by Additional SHO F.B. Industrial Area Karachi, which are taken on record. He is also present in person and undertakes that he will take action in accordance with law against respondent No.4, if found selling water to the local area people under the garb of running an N.G.O. without due authority. Petition has served its purpose and is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge
